text:
is one of WILLE’s escape ships appearing in the Evangelion: 3.0+1.0 Thrice Upon A Time film.

Profile

It was originally a repurposed Assault Craft that WILLE used to capture Wunder. https://twitter.com/khara_inc2/status/1401468358810165253 

It can open into 4 parts where drills can be used to pierce or release from the target. The main engine nozzle is protected by the 4 moving parts when inactive.

History

Evangelion: 3.0+1.0 Thrice Upon A Time

It is used by WILLE's crew to abandon AAA Wunder. It is last seen near the Village-3.
